data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Amazon uses a microservices architecture, allowing for independent deployment and scaling of services.
data.technical_spec: Service-oriented architecture, RESTful APIs, AWS Lambda, Docker containers

data.title: Distributed Systems
data.description: Amazon's infrastructure is based on distributed systems to ensure high availability and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Distributed databases, load balancing, fault tolerance

data.title: Auto-Scaling
data.description: Amazon's infrastructure automatically scales resources based on demand to ensure service elasticity.
data.technical_spec: AWS Auto Scaling, Elastic Load Balancing

data.title: Event-Driven Architecture
data.description: Utilizes event-driven architecture to handle billions of customer requests per day.
data.technical_spec: Amazon SNS, Amazon SQS, AWS Step Functions

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Ensures data consistency and redundancy across multiple regions.
